title: FlexShield Low-Profile Roll-Up Tonneau Cover
description_html:
Protect your cargo from the elements with the FlexShield low-profile roll-up tonneau cover. Constructed from heavy-duty 24oz vinyl with an aluminum frame, it rolls up in seconds and sits nearly flush with the bedrail for a clean factory look.

No-drill installation with clamp-on mounting system. Access cab or crew cab fitment. Available for 5.5-foot and 6.5-foot beds. Includes integrated latch system and drain tubes.
